description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and a global before_script that logs in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD. Define a single stage named build. Add a build job that runs in the build stage for all branches except master, executing docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" . then docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG". Add a build-master job that also runs in the build stage but only on the master branch, executing docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest" . then docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest".
